heading: Omitted
label: 564s Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which related to set-off of indebtedness payable to the tribe or to the United States, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 13, 1954, ch. 732, § 2068 Stat. 723
